JURY OF 12 PERSONS AND 2 ALTERNATES IS SWORN. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED. CAUSE RECESSED UNTIL 9 A.M. 6 JUL 2000.

JURY TRIAL RESUMES IN DEPT 002, COURT, COUNSEL AND JURY PRESENT AS HERETOFORE. ADDITIONAL TESTIMONY HAD. OPENING AND CLOSING ARGUMENT PRESENTED BY RESPECTIVE COUNSEL. JURY INSTRUCTED. AT 2:31 P.M. JURY COMMENCES DELIBERATION. AT 4:47 P.M. JURY RETURNS TO THE COURTROOM WITH SPECIAL VERDICT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. JURY POLLED AND DISCHARGED. EXHIBITS ORDERED RETURNED TO COUNSEL FOR SAFEKEEPING.
SPECIAL VERDICT JURY INSTRUCTIONS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, RACHELLE AKA ROCHELLE LEWIS ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $18,364.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,364.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECOVER COSTS $660.00 AND ATTORNEYS' FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $17,704.00 (WHICH INCLUDES $15,400.00 FOR JAMES A. MICHEL AND $2,304.00 FOR RICHARD P. KOCH ESQ)
